01 / About

Premium Fitness.
Real Results.

F3 Fit Lounge is Kanchrapara Charapole's premium gym — built with Muscleton equipment, stunning purple LED ambiance, a dedicated cardio zone, and expert trainers who push you every rep of the way. Established June 2025.

02 / Gym View

Inside F3
Fit Lounge

Premium equipment, vibrant purple LED ceiling, checkered floor, and a dedicated cardio room — all in Kanchrapara Charapole.

03 / Services

Train with Purpose

Professional training programs for every goal — beginner to advanced. Expert coaching that delivers real, measurable results.

💪
Strength Training

Build muscle and power with Muscleton machines and structured progressive overload programs led by expert trainers.

🔥
Weight Loss

Targeted fat-loss programs combining cardio, resistance training, and personalised nutrition guidance.

🏃
Cardio & Endurance

Dedicated cardio zone with treadmill, elliptical, and cycling — boost stamina and heart health effectively.

🦵
Leg & Lower Body

Dedicated leg press, leg extension, and squat equipment for complete lower body strength and development.

👨‍🏫
Personal Training

One-on-one sessions with a dedicated coach — custom program, form correction, and full accountability.

🥗
Nutrition Guidance

Diet plans and nutrition counseling to complement your training and accelerate your transformation goals.

Kanchrapara's Finest

Joined in July and already seeing results. The leg press and cable machines are top quality. The dedicated cardio room is a great addition — separate from the main floor!

06 / Why F3

Built Different

01

Premium Muscleton Equipment

Every machine is from Muscleton — professional-grade equipment for serious training and real results.

02

Stunning Purple LED Ambiance

Train in a premium environment with geometric LED ceilings that make every session feel elite.

03

Separate Cardio Zone

Dedicated treadmill and elliptical room — separate from the main floor for focused cardio sessions.

04

Expert Personal Coaching

Dedicated trainers who design your program, correct form, and keep you accountable every step.
